title: Caddy route for app.{domain} with cookie auth path
userStory: As Steve, I want app.{domain} to use a signed cookie after a one-time bearer login so that the PWA is usable on phone.
acceptanceCriteria: compose/Caddyfile has app.{$APP_DOMAIN} block reverse-proxying to pwa:3000
/login?token=... bearer match issues a signed __Host-session cookie valid for 30 days
Subsequent requests authenticate via the cookie automatically; bearer fallback retained for API callers
Cookie revocable by rotating the signing key
Verify: visit https://app.{domain}/login?token=... on phone -> redirected to /, cookie set; subsequent visits to / load without bearer; cookie cleared after key rotation
